Why Studio Ghibli Turned To CG Animation For Its Latest Movie It was bound to happen. And it shouldn’t be a complete surprise. The latest Studio Ghibli film, Earwig in the Witch, is a CG animated feature film. Last month, director Goro Miyazaki told Kotaku how that happened. - Kotaku

For The Streamer From The Last Of Us Bunny Meme, Virality Led To Death Threats Over Things She Never Did If Emme “Negaoryx” Montgomery’s chat moderator hadn’t gotten up to use the bathroom, six million people would not have seen what happened next. During a stream last week, a viewer asked Montgomery, “What color is your thong today?” Usually, Montgomery… - Kotaku
